text:
],
            None,
        )
        return {
            "current_loan_balance": _coerce_float(balance, 0.0) if balance is not None else None,
            "current_interest_rate_percent": _coerce_float(rate, 0.0) if rate is not None else None,
            "cash_out_amount": _coerce_float(cash_out, 0.0) if cash_out is not None else None,
            "current_monthly_payment": _coerce_float(payment, 0.0) if payment is not None else None,
        }

    def extract_monthly_rent(res_detail):
        return first_text(
            res_detail,
            [
                "m:BorrowerResidencyMonthlyRentAmount",
                "m:MonthlyRentAmount",
            ],
            None,
        )

    def build_imported_fee_schedule(
        closing_costs: float,
        prepaids: float,
        seller_paid_closing_costs: float,
        discount_points_total: float,
    ) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        order: List[str] = []
        fees: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}

        def add_fee(
            label: str,
            amount: float,
            *,
            paid_by: str = "Borrower",
            is_apr: bool = True,
            is_ppe: bool = False,
            add_to_loan: bool = False,
        ) -> None:
            numeric_amount = round(float(amount or 0.0), 2)
            if numeric_amount <= 0:
                return
            order.append(label)
            fees[label] = {
                "dollar_amount": numeric_amount,
                "point_percent": 0.0,
                "points_linked": False,
                "paid_by": paid_by,
                "is_apr": is_apr,
                "is_ppe": is_ppe,
                "add_to_loan": add_to_loan,
                "total": numeric_amount,
                "order": len(order) - 1,
            }

        total_closing_costs = max(round(float(closing_costs or 0.0), 2), 0.0)
        total_prepaids = max(round(float(prepaids or 0.0), 2), 0.0)
        total_seller_paid = max(round(float(seller_paid_closing_costs or 0.0), 2), 0.0)
        total_points = max(round(float(discount_points_total or 0.0), 2), 0.0)

        points_bucket = min(total_points, total_closing_costs)
        non_points_bucket = max(total_closing_costs - points_bucket, 0.0)

        seller_other = min(total_seller_paid, non_points_bucket)
        seller_remaining = max(total_seller_paid - seller_other, 0.0)
        seller_points = min(seller_remaining, points_bucket)

        borrower_other = max(non_points_bucket - seller_other, 0.0)
        borrower_points = max(points_bucket - seller_points, 0.0)

        add_fee("Closing Costs (Other)", borrower_other, paid_by="Borrower", is_apr=True, is_ppe=False, add_to_loan=False)
        add_fee("Closing Costs (Other) - Seller", seller_other, paid_by="Seller", is_apr=True, is_ppe=False, add_to_loan=False)
        add_fee("Discount Points", borrower_points, paid_by="Borrower", is_apr=True, is_ppe=False, add_to_loan=False)
        add_fee("Discount Points - Seller", seller_points, paid_by="Seller", is_apr=True, is_ppe=False, add_to_loan=False)
        add_fee("Prepaid Items", total_prepaids, paid_by="Borrower", is_apr=False, is_ppe=True, add_to_loan=False)

        if not order:
            return None
        fees["__order__"] = order[:]
        return fees

    # --- EXTRACT DATA ---

    # A. Application Details
    # Navigate to DEAL_SET -> DEALS -> DEAL -> LOANS -> LOAN (SubjectLoan)
    loan_path = ".//m:LOANS/m:LOAN[@LoanRoleType='SubjectLoan']"
    loan_elem = root.find(loan_path, ns)

    # Navigate to DEAL -> COLLATERALS -> SUBJECT_PROPERTY
    prop_path = ".//m:COLLATERALS/m:COLLATERAL/m:SUBJECT_PROPERTY"
    prop_elem = root.find(prop_path, ns)

    # Basic Terms
    purpose = get_text(loan_elem, "m:TERMS_OF_LOAN/m:LoanPurposeType", "Unknown")
    normalized_purpose = str(purpose or "").strip().lower()
    is_refi = (
        "refin" in normalized_purpose
        or "cash-out" in normalized_purpose
        or "cash out" in normalized_purpose
        or normalized_purpose == "cashout"
    )
    mortgage_type = get_text(loan_elem, "m:TERMS_OF_LOAN/m:MortgageType", "")
    amort_type = get_text(loan_elem, "m:AMORTIZATION/m:AMORTIZATION_RULE/m:AmortizationType", "")
    # "MortgageType" lines up with our program presets (Conventional/FHA/VA/USDA). 1003 amortization
    # details (Fixed/ARM/etc.) do not map 1:1 to guideline preset selections, so keep program clean.
    program = (mortgage_type or "").strip()
    
    # loan specifics refers to sub-programs of loan types, eg: VA IRRRLs, FHA Hawaiian homelands, etc.
    # TODO: Map these to specifics more accurately based on conditionals
    loan_specifics = get_text(loan_elem, "m:LOAN_DETAIL/m:LoanProductDescription", "")
    va_first_time_use = get_text(loan_elem, ".//m:VA_LOAN_DETAIL/m:VALoanFirstTimeUseIndicator", "false")
    va_disability = get_text(loan_elem, ".//m:VA_LOAN_DETAIL/m:VALoanVeteranDisabilityIndicator", "false")
    

    loan_amt = _coerce_float(get_text(loan_elem, "m:TERMS_OF_LOAN/m:BaseLoanAmount", 0))
    rate = _coerce_float(get_text(loan_elem, "m:TERMS_OF_LOAN/m:NoteRatePercent", 0))
    term = _coerce_int(
        get_text(loan_elem, "m:AMORTIZATION/m:AMORTIZATION_RULE/m:LoanAmortizationPeriodCount", 360),
        360,
    )
    estimated_closing_costs = _coerce_float(
